---
title: "Workflows & Case Studies"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Workflows & Case Studies}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# Workflows & Case Studies

These tutorials provide extended, end-to-end examples that go beyond the core vignettes.

> **Note**: For the most up-to-date API reference, see the [Manual](manual-index.html) and [Function Reference](../reference/index.html).

## By Task

### Getting Started

- [**v00 - Start Here**](workflows/v00-start-here.html)
- [**v01 - Introduction**](workflows/v01-introduction.html)
- [**v02 - Available Distributions**](workflows/v02-available-distributions.html)

### Core Concepts

- [**v03 - Basic Model Compile & Run**](workflows/v03-basic-model-compile-run.html)
- [**v04 - Backends and Workflow**](workflows/v04-backends-and-workflow.html)

### Unconditional Models

- [**v05 - DPmix CRP**](workflows/v05-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.html)
- [**v06 - DPmix CRP Extended**](workflows/v06-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.html)
- [**v07 - DPmix SB**](workflows/v07-unconditional-DPmix-SB.html)
- [**v08 - DPmixGPD CRP**](workflows/v08-unconditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.html)
- [**v09 - DPmixGPD SB**](workflows/v09-unconditional-DPmixGPD-SB.html)

### Conditional Models

- [**v10 - DPmix CRP**](workflows/v10-conditional-DPmix-CRP.html)
- [**v11 - DPmix SB**](workflows/v11-conditional-DPmix-SB.html)
- [**v12 - DPmixGPD CRP**](workflows/v12-conditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.html)
- [**v13 - DPmixGPD SB**](workflows/v13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB.html)

### Causal Inference

- [**v14 - No Covariates CRP**](workflows/v14-causal-no-x-CRP.html)
- [**v15 - With Covariates SB**](workflows/v15-causal-x-no-ps-SB.html)
- [**v16 - Same Backend CRP**](workflows/v16-causal-same-backend-CRP.html)
- [**v17 - Same Backend SB**](workflows/v17-causal-same-backend-SB.html)
- [**v18 - Different Backends CRP**](workflows/v18-causal-different-backends-CRP.html)
- [**v19 - Different Backends SB**](workflows/v19-causal-different-backends-SB.html)

### Troubleshooting

- [**v20 - Troubleshooting**](workflows/v20-troubleshooting.html)

## By Backend

### CRP

- [**v05 - DPmix CRP**](workflows/v05-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.html)
- [**v06 - DPmix CRP Extended**](workflows/v06-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.html)
- [**v08 - DPmixGPD CRP**](workflows/v08-unconditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.html)
- [**v10 - DPmix CRP**](workflows/v10-conditional-DPmix-CRP.html)
- [**v12 - DPmixGPD CRP**](workflows/v12-conditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.html)
- [**v14 - No Covariates CRP**](workflows/v14-causal-no-x-CRP.html)
- [**v16 - Same Backend CRP**](workflows/v16-causal-same-backend-CRP.html)
- [**v18 - Different Backends CRP**](workflows/v18-causal-different-backends-CRP.html)

### SB

- [**v07 - DPmix SB**](workflows/v07-unconditional-DPmix-SB.html)
- [**v09 - DPmixGPD SB**](workflows/v09-unconditional-DPmixGPD-SB.html)
- [**v11 - DPmix SB**](workflows/v11-conditional-DPmix-SB.html)
- [**v13 - DPmixGPD SB**](workflows/v13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB.html)
- [**v15 - With Covariates SB**](workflows/v15-causal-x-no-ps-SB.html)
- [**v17 - Same Backend SB**](workflows/v17-causal-same-backend-SB.html)
- [**v19 - Different Backends SB**](workflows/v19-causal-different-backends-SB.html)

### Mixed / Comparisons

- [**v04 - Backends and Workflow**](workflows/v04-backends-and-workflow.html)
- [**v18 - Different Backends CRP**](workflows/v18-causal-different-backends-CRP.html)
- [**v19 - Different Backends SB**](workflows/v19-causal-different-backends-SB.html)
